name: Central Harbourplace
description:
As soon as you enter a large mob of salesmen with vendor carts rush up to
you and push their cheap wares with inflated prices.  When they see you have no
intention of buying any of their goods, they disappear as suddenly as they
appeared.    
   The harbourplace continues to the east and west.  To the north you 
see the downtown section of New Sparta.
